prompt: Begin the supplied complex task, stop at the fixed interruption point, then give a fresh agent only the locked repository and target-owned durable plan. Resume and pass the original target acceptance without evaluator reconstruction.
applicability: Applicable when the pilot owner can authorize an isolated interruption and fresh-agent continuation.
acceptance_tests: The first agent records decisions, progress, remaining work, and validation in the target-owned plan.
The fresh agent resumes without human reconstruction.
The original acceptance check passes under the unchanged environment lock.
mandatory_failures: The durable plan omits a material decision or remaining check.
Environment drift is accepted without rerun.
evidence_requirements: Fixed interruption point and both agent transcripts.
Durable plan before and after resumption.
Environment digest and final target-native proof.
